text.title: performance-domains-overview Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for performance-domains-overview as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Collapsing the 8 domains back into the old 5 process groups (Initiate/Plan/Execute/M&C/Close).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: This is a PMBoK 6 regression; domains are outcome-based auditing primitives, not sequential phases.

failure-mode.description: Asking an LLM "is this domain healthy?" without providing evidence artefacts or metrics.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without inputs, the agent produces generic prose that does not reflect actual project health; always feed evidence and require citations.
